hooks.prompt:
You receive a JSON object on stdin. Parse it and check if '.tool_input.command' contains 'git push'. If it does NOT, stop immediately — do nothing.

If it DOES contain 'git push', perform an automated code review:
1. Run: export PATH="$PATH:/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI"
2. Get the commit SHA: git -C D:/manacost-arena rev-parse HEAD
3. Get commit message: git -C D:/manacost-arena log -1 --format='%s'
4. Get the diff stat: git -C D:/manacost-arena diff HEAD~1 HEAD --stat
5. Get the full diff (first 4000 chars): git -C D:/manacost-arena diff HEAD~1 HEAD
6. Review the diff carefully. Write a concise code review with:
   - Max 5 bullet points
   - Focus only on real bugs, security issues, or important problems
   - Skip nitpicks and style issues
   - If no issues found, say so
7. Post the review as a GitHub commit comment:
   gh api repos/Zulut30/manacost-arena/commits/{SHA}/comments -f body='### Auto Code Review\n\n{review}\n\n---\n_🤖 Auto-generated after push_'

Keep the total review under 300 words.
